# S. Wolf & Associates

> Independent insurance agency providing tailored insurance solutions for nonprofit (501(c)(3)) organizations since 1988.

S. Wolf & Associates is a Chicago-based independent agency serving 800+ nonprofits with property & casualty, employee benefits, unemployment insurance, and RFP services. Founded by Polly Kosyla.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, approach, team, and contact information.
- [Nonprofit Insurance Cost Guide](/solutions/nonprofit-insurance-cost-guide): Planning guide for nonprofit insurance budgets, premium drivers, and cost-control tactics.
- [D&O Insurance for Nonprofits](/solutions/do-insurance): Guide to Directors & Officers liability coverage for 501(c)(3) boards.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Client testimonials from nonprofit leaders.
